summary: Plan-mode classification only. #83368 remains the best live canonical PR for the raw external session alias split, #86743 should stay open as the active issue until that PR is repaired and validated, and #86826 is a superseded overlapping PR with failing proof/checks.

actions.reason: Keep as the canonical implementation path, but do not recommend merge because the job blocks merge and the hydrated PR still has failing checks plus an unresolved ClawSweeper blocker.
The issue is the active user-facing report for the same bug family and should remain open until the canonical PR is repaired, validated, and merged.
Supersede the overlapping, weaker PR in favor of the canonical #83368 path, with contributor attribution preserved in the closeout comment.
